violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop next to soda dispenser needs to be stored in a container when not being used.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Clean out washing sink of food debris.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. A knife for food prep was stored in between the prep cooler and prep table.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The prep cooler across from the cooking equipment had products temping between 44 and 51 degrees. The air temp in the bottom was 50.1 degrees. This unit is not maintaining temperature below 41 degrees.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. Some food storage containers in the walk in cooler were black. These need to be light colored.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
